problem: What is the units digit of $13^{2003}$?

classified_questions.question: Can you describe the pattern of units digits that powers of 3 follow?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: Why do powers of 3 have the same units digit as the corresponding powers of 13?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: What is the relationship between the units digit of $3^{2000}$ and $3^{2003}$?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Based on the pattern you observed, what is the units digit of $3^{2003}$?
classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.question: Given that $13^{2003}$ has the same units digit as $3^{2003}$, what is the units digit of $13^{2003}$?
classified_questions.label: b
